title: GMT portal FormSubmit envelope contract
description: Machine-readable fields emitted by the static portal. Power Automate must treat these as untrusted input, validate them, and make Microsoft 365 the authority for status and calendar writes.

timesheet.attachmentRule: Reject inline attachments and all JSON files other than the controlled calendar-sync filename.

authority.browser: May submit a request or cancel its own pending request.
authority.microsoft365: Approves/rejects requests, writes authoritative List records, stores files and creates/updates Outlook calendar events.
